productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Mushroom Brown sandals
description: Style NoteLend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief sandals. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear!Product DetailsMushroom brown sandal with forefoot and midfoot straps along with a low heel collar and stitch detailingDouble padded footbedThick TPU outsole upraised at the heel, has multi directional lugs with an air shock absorber in the middle of the heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
